    319.ShadowheartIllusion: Astarion's an interesting find. Let's hope any future acquaintances don't hold a blade to your throat by way of introduction.TG_ORI_Astarion_Recruited!TG_ORI_Astarion_Recruited

    336.ShadowheartIllusion: I've heard you can't get blood from a stone, but apparently you can get a wizard from one. Gale seems interesting.TG_ORI_GaleRecruited!TG_ORI_GaleRecruited

    54.ShadowheartIllusion: We may need to increase our camp provisions now that we have Karlach along for the journey - those muscles don't run on fresh air, I'll wager. Still, she'll be useful in a fight.TG_PLA_KarlachRecruitment_NoWyll!TG_PLA_KarlachRecruitment_NoWyll

              307.ShadowheartIllusion: I suppose it was a lot to take in. A devil sought us out, teased us with his help...

              Metadata

                Metadata

    308.ShadowheartIllusion: Most would think us mad for wandering right into the middle of a goblin war clan... I suppose that goes to demonstrate just how desperate we are.TG_GOB_GoblinCamp_Entered!TG_GOB_GoblinCamp_Entered

    14.ShadowheartIllusion: My orders were to keep the artefact safe, not pry into it... but I'd be lying if I said I wasn't curious as to what exactly it's hiding...TG_CRE_PlanecasterActivated!TG_CRE_PlanecasterActivated

  • •
    112.ShadowheartIllusion: I think we've overstayed our welcome in this place - if we ever truly had one to begin with. We should leave.TG_CRE_ReturnedFromAstralPlane!TG_CRE_ReturnedFromAstralPlane

    298.ShadowheartIllusion: The crèche... it's nothing but rubble and ashes now. We should put some distance between ourselves and this mess, before any githyanki come investigating.TG_CRE_PostCrecheDestruction!TG_CRE_PostCrecheDestruction

    133.ShadowheartIllusion: That crèche would be a smoking ruin if it wasn't for us. Still, better move along - I don't want to test the limits of your peoples' gratitude.GithyankiTG_CRE_StoppedCrecheDestruction!TG_CRE_StoppedCrecheDestruction

  • •
    130.ShadowheartIllusion: I suppose not many can boast that they've been to a githyanki crèche and survived. Perhaps that's a good omen for our chances going forward, if you're feeling optimistic.TG_CRE_LeftCrecheAfterEverythingIsDone!TG_CRE_LeftCrecheAfterEverythingIsDone

    292.ShadowheartIllusion: Not the cheeriest of inns, this place. But I suppose the mortal peril lurking just past the firelight is liable to put a dampener on the mood.TG_HAV_Misc_IsInHaven!TG_HAV_Misc_IsInHaven

    18.ShadowheartIllusion: The Gauntlet of Shar... I can't believe it. I can't believe we found the Dark Lady's sacred crucible.!Shadowheart_Inparty_State_DiscussedSharTempleShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipperSHA_PartyProgress_EnteredSharTempleTG_SHA_SharTemple_IsInTemple!Chosen of Shar+1 moreShadowheart_Inparty_State_DiscussedSharTemple!TG_SHA_SharTemple_IsInTemple

      364.Player: What did you think of it?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fc244fdb-3595-4295-cad9-1040a0f3383eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he0d2a472ga4d4g4498ga255g1bead7f01cb9Text UUID: 748b11d0-f1e0-40ae-b8e0-0e8488b71854Show Once: True
      • •
        37.ShadowheartIllusion: Overwhelming. Worship of Lady Shar is usually discreet by nature. Her holy sites have to be modest, well-hidden. But that place... I never knew such grandeur had been built in her honour.

        Text

        Overwhelming. Worship of Lady Shar is usually discreet by nature. Her holy sites have to be modest, well-hidden. But that place... I never knew such grandeur had been built in her honour.
        hbf96c0e9g94b6g469ega0ecg9dc2b9bebc69 | 78a8fe35-95cd-465f-aefe-7fdf1d02e8a1 | stub

        Metadata

      143.Player: This is the place where you could become a Dark Justiciar. Your dream might soon be realised.ORI_Shadowheart_Knows_BecomeJusticiar

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • ORI_Shadowheart_Knows_BecomeJusticiar {c29b8679-3e0b-43f9-8578-2a5d7659180e} = True

      • +
        346.ShadowheartIllusion: I know. I can scarcely believe it's real, but I saw it with my own eyes, felt the polished stone walls raised in Lady Shar's honour...

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ecdddaaa-3454-ed2b-5e0e-3148a2d97ce3Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h190ca8cbgf792g4d24ga2cbg9fe6dc1cde28Text UUID: 0e724524-ffcb-4adc-a31d-6addcd2a428dTimeline Phase Index: 253Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ecdddaaa-3454-ed2b-5e0e-3148a2d97ce3Timeline Phase Duration: 25.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2526.3s-2534.8s] | @ 2526.3s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2526.3s-2534.8s] | @ 2528.62s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2526.3s-2534.8s] | @ 2531s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2526.3s-2534.8s] | @ 2533.65s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [2534.8s-2538.51s] | @ 2535.21s | speaker 1 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [2534.8s-2538.51s] | @ 2535.38s | peanut slot 0 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [2534.8s-2538.51s] | @ 2535.41s | peanut slot 1 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [2534.8s-2538.51s] | @ 2535.47s | peanut slot 2 | Fear (16) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 3 [2538.51s-2550.53s] | @ 2543.98s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [2538.51s-2550.53s] | @ 2546.18s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [2538.51s-2550.53s] | @ 2547.05s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Group ID: ecdddaaa-3454-ed2b-5e0e-3148a2d97ce3Group Index: 0
        • •
          189.ShadowheartIllusion: Normally it would not be for me to pursue becoming a Dark Justiciar without a superior's command, but this is different. My lady wanted me to find this place, I know it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7c7e7184-579e-845f-f78b-260b8c9b9916Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hb8290ae0g79e5g4babg9d4dg1f36caa12e64Text UUID: 39ed42cc-73ce-4825-82d3-d3a68b8bb2f9Group ID: ecdddaaa-3454-ed2b-5e0e-3148a2d97ce3Group Index: 1
    • +
      122.Player: Tell me what you know of the place.

      Metadata

        103.ShadowheartIllusion: The Gauntlet of Shar is no ordinary temple - it is the highest test of the Dark Lady's faithful, to judge if they are worthy of becoming a Dark Justiciar.SHA_Trials_Knows_LearnedAboutTrials

        Flags and Tags

        • +
          147.ShadowheartIllusion: The Gauntlet has double meaning - it speaks of the ordeals to be overcome, and of the armour-clad fist of Lady Shar that would embrace the worthy. Survive the crushing gauntlet, and be embraced by the Nightsinger at its very core.

          Text

          The Gauntlet has double meaning - it speaks of the ordeals to be overcome, and of the armour-clad fist of Lady Shar that would embrace the worthy. Survive the crushing gauntlet, and be embraced by the Nightsinger at its very core.
          hf0fb9944g5205g443fgbdc2gbc38568130f1 | 8e4e4278-4002-4487-b201-5b096c8cbcbe | stub

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5eefbd05-d5b3-a769-8671-083355f01d4fSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: hf0fb9944g5205g443fgbdc2gbc38568130f1Text UUID: 8e4e4278-4002-4487-b201-5b096c8cbcbeGroup ID: 48355221-f71a-b015-f257-f1ab236d8f38Group Index: 1
          • •
            258.ShadowheartIllusion: The old ways were lost over time - now some claim the rank simply by killing a single Selûnite. But before, they were a true elite. Many would attempt the trials, but few would succeed. [End]

            Text

            The old ways were lost over time - now some claim the rank simply by killing a single Selûnite. But before, they were a true elite. Many would attempt the trials, but few would succeed.
            hc064df30g4163g4699g8a0agefa461ec92ec | ee2e0f65-5b8f-4ba3-8a51-050989436860 | stub

            Metadata

        121.ShadowheartIllusion: He slew Lady Shar's children - by rights I should avenge them and cut that ugly head right off his thick neck... but I'm no fool either. Picking a fight with him would be a distraction - a potentially fatal one.

        Text

        He slew Lady Shar's children - by rights I should avenge them and cut that ugly head right off his thick neck... but I'm no fool either. Picking a fight with him would be a distraction - a potentially fatal one.
        hdab08b25g6f5ag4771gb3ebg1e9c422aa5fd | fef43c9c-bc24-41bf-9d4d-41ab807ed546 | stub

        Metadata

        206.ShadowheartIllusion: He's a pompous sack of spare parts. He and his undead lackeys should never have come here. Perhaps I can rid Lady Shar's gauntlet of them yet...

        Metadata

      305.ShadowheartIllusion: It's so strange - I don't remember much of it, yet I can't help feel like I know it. It feels like home.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cef42a2b-33fe-4121-a75c-fe893a9a7421Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h01d91aa9gd0a9g44ecgb210ge5abf58845a8Text UUID: a4e5a02a-fe7b-4273-ac36-343f069af5e7Group ID: 391267b6-9592-4b95-8582-65de2bcee2e4Group Index: 1

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Chosen of Shar
    It seems Viconia sought a greater purpose than Lady Shar had decided for her.
    had23e558gd68fg4c15g8b98gba8de297f2dd | 3724734c-631b-4de8-b134-ee06dde8f09f | stub

    Variant 2

    Shar did not come to Viconia's defence. All who bow to her are disposable pawns, in the end.
    h56e2d8f2g1110g419cgba90g2091135d1970 | 1efa9de4-d0d2-492b-9377-5daf3cd4eeea | stub

      287.ShadowheartIllusion: Ironic. She tried to cling to Lady Shar's good graces, but that just hastened her downfall. LOW_SharGrotto_Knows_ViconiaArtefactMotivationChosen of Shar

      Flags and Tags

      • •
        238.ShadowheartIllusion: She should have just obeyed - forgotten about the artefact. Then perhaps she could have still served the Nightsinger... under me, of course. [End]

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9e2a2fa1-f2bd-4505-8eca-721714fa485bSpeaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h77d1489eg8704g438dg9ac5ge7d60b730067Text UUID: 9526b73c-b8d0-453a-ae98-2ea154830f1dEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: c0433db6-5425-424f-98e1-3d187ff4ffb1Group Index: 1
    • +
      192.ShadowheartIllusion: The mission she sent me on was a lie - same as everything else she ever told me.LOW_SharGrotto_Knows_ViconiaArtefactMotivation

      Flags and Tags

        297.ShadowheartIllusion: She sowed her own downfall in trying to take the prism for herself. Had she never sent me, I'd still bow to Shar, none the wiser... [End]

        Metadata

    239.ShadowheartIllusion: That's Orin dealt with - good riddance. Now that we have her Netherstone, we're one big step closer to finishing this, once and for all.TG_LOW_Orin_Killed!TG_LOW_Orin_KilledShadowheart_InParty_State_EndDialog

    70.ShadowheartIllusion: It seems your fellow githyanki are keen to reclaim the artefact I carry. I can't afford that to happen.Githyanki!Shadowheart_InParty_DiscussedRedDragonPLA_GithChokepoint_State_SceneDoneCURRENTREGION_WLD_Main_ATG_PLA_GithChokepoint_EncounteredGithShadowheart_InParty_DiscussedRedDragon!TG_PLA_GithChokepoint_EncounteredGith

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Githyanki
    It seems your fellow githyanki are keen to reclaim the artefact I carry. I can't afford that to happen.
    h53fa4f8fge3abg4adcga827gfe5be2707612 | e8f40c57-9cd3-46ef-a2ba-87fcf6d7f6b2 | stub

    Variant 2

    It seems the githyanki are keen to reclaim the artefact I carry. I can't afford that to happen.
    h230d3dbage7fcg41a5g9465g915e2a239463 | ba124b8c-af58-4c8f-9f9a-1d495675e776 | stub

    • +
      303.ShadowheartIllusion: In fact, none of us can. That thing is shielding us, somehow. I don't want to know what happens if we lose it.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cd765ae6-bb18-4b74-be87-af985a5ddc64Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h47fc8cbbgd82dg45edg83a1ga3207132348aText UUID: 7013133f-a7a7-478a-a483-1c257160f2bdTimeline Phase Index: 242Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cd765ae6-bb18-4b74-be87-af985a5ddc64Timeline Phase Duration: 9.42sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2415.42s-2422.73s] | @ 2416.42s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2415.42s-2422.73s] | @ 2417.89s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2415.42s-2422.73s] | @ 2418.99s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2415.42s-2422.73s] | @ 2420.27s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2415.42s-2422.73s] | @ 2422.12s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2424.84s-2428.75s] | @ 2424.84s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)
      • +
        8.Player: You have the audacity to flaunt how you stole from my people? Perhaps I should surrender you and this artefact.Githyanki

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
        • Githyanki {e49c027c-6ec6-4158-9afb-8b59236d10fd} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0353154a-570b-4719-bb38-aea4db6939f3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbcfaaddcg7d96g427ag84f7g99bf8122e554Text UUID: df7dd852-2182-46ef-97fe-9a99865f1819Show Once: True
        • •
          23.ShadowheartIllusion: I'll wager they'll thank you with a blade through the heart. You're tainted in their eyes, same as me. And your best chance is to stay close to the artefact. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0ea9ee63-f190-44d8-b5ec-636dd00ba0c3Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: he89ba3a7gac6eg4236g8717gc025f1c46db0Text UUID: 1331ac74-e5ae-4a6a-9830-689d19873790Timeline Phase Index: 308Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0ea9ee63-f190-44d8-b5ec-636dd00ba0c3Timeline Phase Duration: 11.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3031.81s-3041.79s] | @ 3032.52s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3031.81s-3041.79s] | @ 3035.32s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3031.81s-3041.79s] | @ 3036.62s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [3031.81s-3041.79s] | @ 3038.41s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [3031.81s-3041.79s] | @ 3040.71s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)End Node: True
      • +
        309.Player: Let's not find out. We have enough to contend with already.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d2e136eb-8804-4b35-a97c-2e8f970750feSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd98a7362g37e7g41c2gb737g69923cea73faText UUID: 4ab46b6c-3a1c-4dfd-9d7d-eef8028c182aShow Once: True
        • •
          57.ShadowheartIllusion: Agreed. There's not much we can do but press forward. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 28ed71b1-77e7-4848-a9bc-06bc108b5710Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h3451896ag1f2fg46e7g8e25g674a5c0157c8Text UUID: 500763ad-7f1d-403e-acfd-5bb35e69109fTimeline Phase Index: 307Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 28ed71b1-77e7-4848-a9bc-06bc108b5710Timeline Phase Duration: 5.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3026.74s-3030.57s] | @ 3028.41s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3026.74s-3030.57s] | @ 3029.89s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)End Node: True
      • +
        16.Player: There must be more to the artefact. You were sent to take it - you must know why it's so important.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 09d2edab-c66e-4932-b2c8-14e71e5bfeadSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc37f43cfgeafag4527gb4e4g2a3a0e94b60aText UUID: 37cce9c8-b54c-4364-ad0d-2a5f64c56a6aShow Once: True
        • •
          277.ShadowheartIllusion: I only know what I know... I was ordered to retrieve it, and that's what I intend to do. The rest is immaterial to me. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bd28bd2c-2110-4d97-a482-b40a192d4dd1Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h1a10b7eeg689eg4b5bg86dcgff90ba9a80e6Text UUID: 42b0b8d1-b5c6-4670-943d-3a51bbb564eeTimeline Phase Index: 296Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bd28bd2c-2110-4d97-a482-b40a192d4dd1Timeline Phase Duration: 9.33sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2873.43s-2881.41s] | @ 2877.68s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2873.43s-2881.41s] | @ 2879.33s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2873.43s-2881.41s] | @ 2880.6s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)End Node: True
      • +
        187.Player: The artefact is shielding us, but ultimately, you wish to give it away? Something has to give.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7b3034f3-b7f6-4224-ab1e-9c9f2fa9a28cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h63a5f1c6gba76g4531gacdbg467bdf46b5a3Text UUID: 4fe9180f-94f3-4794-9bac-82a6fb5ebd47Show Once: True
        • •
          357.ShadowheartIllusion: A problem for another time. Hopefully we'll no longer be in need of protection by the time my mission draws to an end. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f2d94c5a-3b53-4dbc-8248-35455695b2b8Speaker: 0 (ShadowheartIllusion)Text Handle: h193a878fg0b78g48f1g9870gc80fe1006868Text UUID: 26e0b405-78c0-42ad-8260-e11ef00d5ba9Timeline Phase Index: 305Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f2d94c5a-3b53-4dbc-8248-35455695b2b8Timeline Phase Duration: 8.38sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [3013.06s-3020.18s] | @ 3015.07s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [3013.06s-3020.18s] | @ 3017.43s | speaker 0 | emotion unchanged | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [3013.06s-3020.18s] | @ 3018.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)End Node: True

    341.ShadowheartIllusion: I thought perhaps you'd be tempted to seize Cazador's prize in his stead... but you didn't. Perhaps that makes you the better man - I'm sure all those people you spared would agree.CustomChosen of SharTG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarStayedVampireSpawn!TG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarStayedVampireSpawn

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Custom
    I thought perhaps you'd be tempted to seize Cazador's prize in his stead... but you didn't. Perhaps that makes you the better man - I'm sure all those people you spared would agree.
    hafb337f7g028fg4bcagbf2fgb9128c32d25d | c474855e-f1ee-4d35-b43f-16aba2b537a5 | stub

    Variant 2

    combine=0
    • Chosen of Shar
    I thought perhaps you'd be tempted to seize Cazador's prize in his stead... but you didn't. Pity - a vampire lord would have been a fine ally... but no matter. It's done.
    hb19260ffga71eg4921gb2edg2effcf9a4aff | 7ff08780-b21e-4b89-ba13-ced9767e7bd0 | stub

    197.ShadowheartIllusion: So, you're free from your hunger, free from any lingering fear of the sun... but all those lives you sacrificed, Astarion. I'm not sure I'll forget their final screams any time soon.Enemy of SharChosen of SharTG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarBecameVampireLord!TG_ORI_Astarion_AvatarBecameVampireLord

    Text

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Enemy of Shar
    So, you're free from your hunger, free from any lingering fear of the sun... but all those lives you sacrificed, Astarion. I'm not sure I'll forget their final screams any time soon.
    he7ed64dfg7fbdg4855g889dg12c03f86eeb8 | a9f72ea0-abb2-43c3-a773-7a5fdec70c74 | stub

    Variant 2

    combine=0
    • Chosen of Shar
    'Vampire Ascendant'. A fine prize, Astarion, paid for with a sea of blood. I'm glad to know I have an ally who understands the value of sacrifice - congratulations.
    hb2d1b006g09e2g4dcag9b4bg9fddc036db83 | b8ae0739-a15b-404f-9d64-0ceed40c16ce | stub

    356.ShadowheartIllusion: Not for me to shed tears over a Selûnite like Isobel, but you condemned a lot of people when you struck her down. People we could have had use of.Chosen of SharTG_DarkUrge_KilledIsobelDark Urge!TG_DarkUrge_KilledIsobel

    Variant 1

    combine=0
    • Chosen of Shar
    Not for me to shed tears over a Selûnite like Isobel, but you condemned a lot of people when you struck her down. People we could have had use of.

    Variant 2

    combine=0
      A lot of people died because you lost the run of yourself. Isobel shielded them from the shadows - and you left them vulnerable.

      214.ShadowheartIllusion: I know you have your personal demons to contend with... but if I didn't make it clear before, I think you can beat this. Just don't give in, and seek help if you need it.TG_DarkUrge_SparedIsobelNightDark Urge!TG_DarkUrge_SparedIsobelNight

      15.ShadowheartIllusion: I thought I was the one most burdened with secrets - seems I was very mistaken. All this time we've been fighting and fleeing from the Absolute, and we've one of their figureheads in our midst.TG_DarkUrge_GortashOMDark Urge!TG_DarkUrge_GortashOM

      Flags and Tags

      Text

      I thought I was the one most burdened with secrets - seems I was very mistaken. All this time we've been fighting and fleeing from the Absolute, and we've one of their figureheads in our midst.
      h53bd8c93g22fag4f41gb761gcd2097085682 | 71406474-a26f-4fe5-b3ce-b2182aeb636d | stub

        265.ShadowheartIllusion: But I can hardly hold that against you - you seemed as surprised as I was. If you're able to resist your urges, then surely you can resist the lure of past allegiances also. [End]Shadowheart_InParty_State_EndDialog

      152.ShadowheartIllusion: It was no easy thing, overcoming those urges that gripped you. I'm not sure I would have managed, in your shoes. Well done.TG_DarkUrge_DefiedBhaalDark Urge!TG_DarkUrge_DefiedBhaal

      • Enemy of Shar
      Be careful, consuming shadow magic. The darkness tends to take more than it gives. I would know.

      128.ShadowheartIllusion: A goddess abandoning you needn't be the end, Gale. Trust me, I know.GaleEnemy of SharTG_ORI_GaleMetElminsterInWYR!TG_ORI_GaleMetElminsterInWYR

      Flags and Tags

      ruletagtype rule
      • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19}
      • Enemy of Shar {8eca8027-996c-4c61-bec6-77f853de295b}

      • TG_ORI_GaleMetElminsterInWYR {36accdc7-ac1f-41fa-8f13-e7dac633dbb8} = False

      Text

      Variant 1

      combine=0
      • Gale
      • Enemy of Shar
      A goddess abandoning you needn't be the end, Gale. Trust me, I know.
      he04b42c3g1e56g4e53gae89gcea4e919cc0f | 60b86b61-50ba-4ddd-8e63-14ae17edbdfb | stub

      Variant 2

      combine=0
      • Gale
      I'm sorry, Gale. To be abandoned by your goddess... I cannot imagine how that must feel. May the Dark Lady comfort you.
      h1ffaff6cg0299g4169gbed7ga4faf5027bfb | 0eb51fb8-905a-4c11-998c-6db63a079c34 | stub

      Variant 3

      combine=0
      • Enemy of Shar
      Poor Gale. I hope he knows that a goddess abandoning him needn't be the end - I know from experience.
      h31584b2agd22bg4587g9f9cg1b575a5f994c | 6b007e4f-742c-47bc-a6b0-c4c51ac3dee8 | stub

      Variant 4

      Poor Gale. To be abandoned by his goddess... I cannot imagine how that must feel. May the Dark Lady comfort him.
      h7d18c2c2gff4ag41bag95d9gc106f1f4bd0a | eaaa37c2-3202-4a36-b041-a9de1355156b | stub

      275.ShadowheartIllusion: So Astarion didn't fulfil his master's ambitions for himself. At least that means he's his own man... though I'm a little surprised he didn't covet those powers.TG_ORI_Astarion_CompanionStayedVampireSpawn!TG_ORI_Astarion_CompanionStayedVampireSpawn

      200.ShadowheartIllusion: I don't know how exactly Orin managed to spirit away someone as big as Halsin, but we have to get him back - either via a rescue, or Gortash's death.!GLO_Gortash_State_PermaDefeatedTG_GEN_OrinAbducted_HalsinShadowheart_InParty_State_EndDialog!TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Halsin

      366.ShadowheartIllusion: Karlach. Facing your own mortality in such a... definitive manner must be hard. I'm sorry. If it's any consolation, the rest of us are still liable to perish anyway.KarlachTG_ORI_Karlach_AfterGortashDeathCompanion!TG_ORI_Karlach_AfterGortashDeathCompanion

      Text

      Variant 1

      combine=0
      • Karlach
      Karlach. Facing your own mortality in such a... definitive manner must be hard. I'm sorry. If it's any consolation, the rest of us are still liable to perish anyway.
      he846d5f0gf0a6g4754gbc82geb503f59edc2 | bde0689d-a768-418d-bf05-2b26ec9351f1 | stub

      Variant 2

      Poor Karlach, having to face her own mortality in such a... definitive manner. Though the rest of us are still liable to perish, if it's any consolation.
      h9a39f555gd659g4850g8aefg0d2d366f05bf | 6a4b5073-745e-447a-ae5c-47dfdd7805f3 | stub

      combine=0
      • Wyll
      • Chosen of Shar

      h4b771e83g4a4ag4357gae7ag5d946bd58e4d | f242f7b8-f658-4739-af7c-13c65520904e | stub

      combine=0
      • Wyll

      • Chosen of Shar

      160.ShadowheartIllusion: Your father won't be around forever, Wyll. But the pact? That's a different matter. I hope you won't live to regret being sentimental.WyllChosen of SharTG_ORI_WyllEternalPact!TG_ORI_WyllEternalPact

      Flags and Tags

      ruletagtype rule
      • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956}
      • Chosen of Shar {9624a3fe-bb9e-47c5-b9ab-417e6da6f84b}
      checktype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
      • TG_ORI_WyllEternalPact {7b06eb83-4963-4b24-9637-324bdb6eda83} = True
      settype Object | speaker 0 ShadowheartIllusion
      • TG_ORI_WyllEternalPact {7b06eb83-4963-4b24-9637-324bdb6eda83} = False

      Text

      Variant 1

      combine=0
      • Wyll
      • Chosen of Shar
      Your father won't be around forever, Wyll. But the pact? That's a different matter. I hope you won't live to regret being sentimental.
      h23db29c5gf9b8g49c1gb114g67e3b8cadb94 | 85d8fce9-f3be-43b5-8135-4c3e113c181d | stub

      Variant 2

      combine=0
      • Wyll
      It can't have been easy, to resign yourself to keeping the pact. But I'm glad you choose your father.
      he196bd0fg4859g41c0g8eedgaa88b69c9dd5 | 1b6f21c6-4af9-47db-ad0e-b7976dcfaac7 | stub

      Variant 3

      combine=0
      • Chosen of Shar
      Wyll's father won't be around forever, but the pact? That's a different matter. I hope he won't live to regret being sentimental.
      hb20a62d6g7460g4732g8b81g457a05c1653e | 59f012db-f4a0-4c32-8598-75c3c6882d41 | stub

      Variant 4

      It can't have been easy, for Wyll to resign himself to the pact. But I'm glad he chose his father.
      hef963a24g7a8cg47aagaa34g71ed1e47e60b | 7f1acad2-fb5d-4472-9eb5-bc937153bab3 | stub

      246.ShadowheartIllusion: An infestation of vampire spawn - that's just about the last thing I wanted to wake up to. We thwarted their efforts to seize Astarion, at least.TG_ORI_Astarion_SpawnAmbushSucceeded!TG_ORI_Astarion_SpawnAmbushSucceededShadowheart_InParty_State_EndDialog

      Flags and Tags

      286.ShadowheartIllusion: Shar's power still grips this land. A shame we could not banish it - it would have felt good to spite her.Enemy of SharTG_SCE_HalsinLeaves!TG_SCE_HalsinLeaves

      Flags and Tags

      ruletagtype rule
      • Enemy of Shar {8eca8027-996c-4c61-bec6-77f853de295b}

      • TG_SCE_HalsinLeaves {f72fe670-a83f-41ac-b513-1774175e0b44} = False

      Text

      Variant 1

      combine=0
      • Enemy of Shar
      Shar's power still grips this land. A shame we could not banish it - it would have felt good to spite her.
      h5e513325g8f81g42b5g97e6gfa2698625b48 | 8c163370-c812-4843-9934-2763bdacc036 | stub

      Variant 2

      This land remains cloaked by Lady Shar's power - good. A shame it cost us Halsin as a travelling companion though. He may have been misguided, but I liked looking at him.
      h8b302562g446eg4a92gad17g71e2d5df9f27 | 5e451a5e-660a-4fac-9f8b-eb44ad4ed441 | stub

                127.ShadowheartIllusion: I see... then I hope she understands. But I trust your judgement.

                  240.ShadowheartIllusion: Whatever you choose to do, you can count on my support. [End]
